text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not too shabby, but you could use some practice
doing physics calculations in your head.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So what're you gonna do with the loot?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Not even a little bit. ...But on the other
hand, we've gotta do something.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I bet there's someone back at the academy who'd
be interested. I'll check when we get back.
